title: microsorum scandens
intro: Microsorum scandens, also known as Java fern, is a species of vascular plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a non-vascular, terrestrial fern that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. Microsorum scandens contains compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing potential health benefits including reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used as a topical application to treat skin conditions.
